notes: Every now and then it takes a little time to start, but so far it always started with no necessary tweaks.
title: Kill to Collect

notes:
Game worked flawlessly. One of my party members (using linux) had troubles using the controller, as the game didn't detect the key bindings correctly, but adjusting them manually seems fine.
We played several levels in the coop story mode, and nothing (as far as compatibility is concerded) went wrong so far.
title: Kill to Collect
